_doc: U113 (E5-8; closes G6) — Unified browser->API->MCP fallback ladder ('inability to fail').
ONE auditable declaration of the attempt order across the three transports for each
Skill 6 build surface, so the order is testable and never silently drifts from the
code paths it describes. Read by tools/ghl_fallback_ladder.py.
GATE: the ladder only OVERLAYS existing per-surface methods when GHL_FALLBACK_LADDER=1
(see tools/ghl_fallback_ladder.py::FLAG_ENV). Flag OFF (default) => only the FIRST
declared rung is attempted, i.e. today's single-method + ad-hoc-fallback behavior is
unchanged. Revert = flip the flag back off, then revert the commit.
Every 'order' entry is grounded in a real file this repo already ships — see the
'evidence' map per surface. A surface with only ONE real transport today (no
fabricated second rung) is listed under 'not_laddered' with the reason, never given
an invented fallback (D8 'zero invented selectors' doctrine, generalized).

evidence.api: tools/ghl_rest_canvas.py — pure REST JSON splice into the page blob; "GLUE, NOT THE CLICKER" — no drag, no browser, no network of its own.
evidence.browser: tools/ghl_iframe_drag.py PAGE/FUNNEL CODE-ELEMENT DRAG FALLBACK (B-U16 item 1) — GHL_PAGE_CODE_DRAG flag-wired UI-drive fallback, wired in U30.
evidence.mcp: tools/ghl_media.py — "folders/uploads go via the GHL API / official MCP / community MCP / Skill 44, NEVER by driving the page builder UI" (media-object rung for page content).

evidence.note: tools/ghl_iframe_drag.py groups PAGE/FUNNEL under the identical CODE-ELEMENT DRAG FALLBACK; same builder tools (ghl_rest_canvas.py, ghl_iframe_drag.py) serve both.

evidence.mcp: tools/ghl_form_builder.py — SMART layer "PRE-CREATES every custom field and tag through the GHL API layer (Skill 44)" before any browser action.
evidence.browser: tools/ghl_form_builder.py — DUMB/DO layer drags the pre-created zhc_ fields onto the canvas via snapshot-and-bind (smoke_first); no field-placement REST API exists, so 'api' is NOT a real third rung here (never fabricated).
tools/ghl_survey_builder.py — "The survey builder's PRIMARY lane is the browser drag rail" (ghl_survey_rest.py docstring).
evidence.api: tools/ghl_survey_rest.py — CANVAS-FREE capture-gated REST fallback (build_method='rest'); refuses to blind-POST, derives the save route ONLY from a recorded capture receipt.

evidence.mcp: tools/ghl_workflow_builder.py — "Skill 44 documented a Tier 4 agent-browser workflow-BUILD backstop for when the Firebase token is unread/misconfigured" implies Skill 44 (MCP) is the normal build path.
evidence.browser: tools/ghl_workflow_builder.py — the Tier-4 agent-browser backstop itself; drives the Automations builder UI through browser_manager.sh when the MCP/token path is unavailable.

evidence.mcp: tools/ghl_community_builder.py — "spec §3 marks it ASSUMED until the first-hour Tier-1/Tier-2 tool-list check; the router flips primary automatically if a create tool is found."
evidence.browser: tools/ghl_community_builder.py — "GoHighLevel has NO known public create API for a community/group ... The create surface is therefore browser-only" (today's actual path, U106-hardened).

evidence.mcp: tools/ghl_course_builder.py — same Tier-1/Tier-2 tool-list check as the community builder; router flips primary automatically if a create tool is found.
evidence.browser: tools/ghl_course_builder.py — "GoHighLevel has NO known public create API for a course ... The create + outline surface is browser-only" (today's actual path, U106-hardened).

evidence.mcp: tools/ghl_media.py — "official MCP / community MCP / Skill 44" alternate upload path.
evidence.browser_excluded: tools/ghl_media.py — "NO browser control for media storage ... NEVER by driving the page builder UI" — browser is explicitly forbidden for this surface, not merely unproven.

pipeline.reason: single-lane today: GHL exposes NO public API to create a pipeline or pipeline stage (operator-ratified 2026-07-07, confirmed against GHL's real v2 AND v3 OpenAPI specs; only GET /opportunities/pipelines is public). Browser is the ONLY transport. Declaring a second/third rung here would be a fabricated fallback (forbidden). Add a real ladder entry the day GHL ships a create API for this object.
